name: 4'x5'6" Chevron Striped Area Rug Ivory/Tan - Room Essentials™
description:
Add comfort and style to your floor with this Chevron Striped Area Rug from Room Essentials™. This rectangular area rug in cream and tan showcases a chevron striped pattern for a neutral look that blends with any decor. The spray latex backing keeps the rug firmly in place, while the flat pile height makes it perfect for frequently used areas like your living room, hallway or entryway.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
